name: @godaddy-x/wallet-api-js
description: Wallet API SDK for Node.js: OPS and MPC WebSocket integration.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/client.test.ts test/log-watch.test.ts test/trade-hook.test.ts test/app-login-sign.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/connect.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-wallet-address: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/run-btc-wallet-address.mts
scripts.test:btc-transfer: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/btc-transfer.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-dust: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/btc-dust-change.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-summary-multi: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/btc-summary-multi.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-summary: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/btc-summary.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-balance-audit: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/btc-balance-audit.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-listen: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/btc-listen.test.ts
